Rule.name: Toolkit-ServiceAccountExclusion
Rule.Description:
Excludes service and system accounts from manager certification campaigns. Evaluates identity names against patterns and checks identity type attributes to filter out non-human accounts that should be certified separately.
Trigger: Fires during certification generation for each identity. Variables in scope: context (SailPointContext), entity (AbstractCertifiableEntity), certification (Certification), certContext (CertificationContext).
